## Objective and scope

Describe the outcome, linked requirement, and intentionally excluded work.

## Acceptance evidence

- [ ] Changed critical paths have automated tests or an explicit risk note.
- [ ] `Enterprise CI` required checks pass without bypasses.
- [ ] Migrations and rollback behavior are documented when applicable.
- [ ] Security, tenant isolation, secrets, and privacy impact were reviewed.
- [ ] Operational impact, telemetry, and runbooks were reviewed.
- [ ] Generated dependency locks were refreshed with the pinned `uv` version.
- [ ] No known P0/P1 defect is being accepted silently.

## Verification and residual risk

List commands/checks run, results, skipped checks with reasons, and remaining risk.
